advantages: Optimized output (tree-shaking, minify, splitting) means faster-loading apps.
Transpilation lets you write modern TS/JS and still support target browsers.
Dev servers with HMR make iteration extremely fast.
A rich ecosystem covers apps, libraries and scripts.
disadvantages: Configuration and tool choice can be overwhelming.
Fast transpilers skip type-checking, so a separate tsc step is needed.
Build steps add complexity over plain script tags.
Misconfiguration can defeat tree-shaking or bloat bundles.
